nodes.condition: dependency_license in ('GPL-2.0', 'GPL-3.0') and linking != 'none' and project_license in ('MIT', 'BSD-3-Clause', 'Apache-2.0', 'proprietary', 'LGPL-3.0', 'MPL-2.0')
nodes.critic_note: the license×linking×distribution interaction: copyleft propagates only when linked AND distributed into a non-GPL project
project is already (A)GPL — linking GPL in is fine
the non-obvious edge a human misses: Apache-2.0 patent terms are incompatible with GPLv2
